the Tower of London and afterwards in the castle of St. Breval.

zh.lifeSummary: 當David de Graham Laird of Dundaff於1274年4月27日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴時，他的父親Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff11271歲，母親Princess Iasabella Canmore40歲。他於大約1294年與Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1296年登記服兵役。他去世於1329年6月14日在英國蘇格蘭培爾金加迪享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de Graham Laird of Dundaff于1274年4月27日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴时，他的父亲Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff11271岁，母亲Princess Iasabella Canmore40岁。他于大约1294年与Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1296年登记服兵役。他去世于1329年6月14日在英国苏格兰培爾金加迪享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David de Graham Laird of Dundaff was born on 27 April 1274, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, was 11271 and his mother, Princess Iasabella Canmore, was 40. He married Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire about 1294, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1296. He died on 14 June 1329, in Kincardine, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David de Graham Laird of Dundaff est né le 27 avril 1274, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, avait 11271 ans et sa mère, Princess Iasabella Canmore, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire environ 1294, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1296. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1329, à Kincardine, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de Graham Laird of Dundaff am 27. April 1274 in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff 11271 und seine Mutter Princess Iasabella Canmore 40. Er hat um 1294 in Scotland Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1296 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. Juni 1329 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kincardine, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de Graham Laird of Dundaff è nato il il 27 aprile 1274 nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, aveva 11271 anni e il suo madre, Princess Iasabella Canmore, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire circa 1294, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1296. Morì il 14 giugno 1329, nel Kincardine, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: David de Graham Laird of Dundaffが1274年4月27日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで生まれた時，父Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaffは11271歳，母Princess Iasabella Canmoreは40歳であった。約1294年にスコットランドでIsabella Erskine- of Perthshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年に兵役登録をした。彼は1329年6月14日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアキンカーディンで55歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David de Graham Laird of Dundaff(이)가 1274년 4월 27일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff(은)는 11271세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Iasabella Canmore(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1294년 스컷랜드에서 Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1329년 6월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 킨카딘에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.27 April 1274–14 June 1329: 27 de abril de 1274–14 de junho de 1329
pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de Graham Laird of Dundaff nasceu em 27 de abril de 1274, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, tinha 11271 anos e sua mãe, Princess Iasabella Canmore, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire aproximadamente 1294, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1296. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1329, em Kincardine, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de Graham Laird of Dundaff родился 27 апреля 1274 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff было 11271 год, а матери, которую звали Princess Iasabella Canmore, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire около 1294 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1296 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 июня 1329 г. в местности кинкардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.27 April 1274–14 June 1329: 27 de abril de 1274–14 de junio de 1329
es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de Graham Laird of Dundaff nació el 27 de abril de 1274, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, tenía 11271 años y su mamá, Princess Iasabella Canmore, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire aproximadamente 1294, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1296. Murió el 14 de junio de 1329, en Kincardine, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
